---
title: "PermResult"
generated: true
description: "Permutation-test output (all maps in the input spatial shape)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.randomise`](../nitrix-stats-inference-randomise.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PermResult -->
```python
class PermResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:PermResult -->
Permutation-test output (all maps in the input spatial shape).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PermResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(stat: Float[Array, '*spatial'], enhanced: Float[Array, '*spatial'], p_fwe: Float[Array, '*spatial'], p_uncorrected: Float[Array, '*spatial'], null_max: Float[Array, 'n_perm']) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:PermResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `n_perm` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
